texto: It may sound crazy, but people like to eat what they are. If they have voracious habits they can't change, they like sweet foods. If they are tight with their money, they prefer to eat bread and mashed potatoes. If they are flamboyant they like to eat elaborately thin vegetables, fried and piled up high like a fancy hat. We are all cannibals, eating the secrets we have within.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Josh Barkan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios. O trecho “It may sound crazy, but people like to eat what they are. If they have voracious habits they can'…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, eating, food pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e food.
